heading: Locally-employed staff wages
label: 3968a Locally-employed staff wages
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of State Authorities Act, Fiscal Year 2017, and not as part of the Foreign Service Act of 1980 which comprises this chapter.
Amendments2023—Subsec. (a). substituted “every 3 years” for “periodically” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 118–31
DefinitionsFor definitions of “Secretary” and “appropriate congressional committees” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 114–323section 2651 of this title
amendments: Amendments2023—Subsec. (a). substituted “every 3 years” for “periodically” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 118–31

children.text: is based on the specific recruiting and retention needs of each such post and local labor market conditions, as determined annually; and
is not less than the 50th percentile of the prevailing wage for comparable employment in the labor market surrounding each such post.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: The prevailing wage rate goal established under subsection (a) shall not apply if compliance with such subsection would be inconsistent with applicable United States law, the law in the locality of employment, or the public interest.
shall be filed electronically and retained for not less than 5 years; and
shall be made available to the appropriate congressional committees upon request.
